7f86d67a4d70.jpg.caption: Photo of the Murchison meteorite — useful as a concrete, real-world visual when discussing presolar grains preserved in chondritic matrices (source: Wikipedia/Wikimedia Commons).

cc95bb48d664.jpg.caption: Phys.org header image for 'Simulations suggest a breakthrough in understanding how turbulence develops' (March 11, 2026) — useful visual for discussing turbulence onset, transition mechanisms, and how large-scale simulations change what we can test.

1c6d7b4e660d.png.caption: Figure from Space.com on black hole–neutron star mergers with unusual eccentric (oval) pre-merger orbits; useful visual for discussing formation channels, gravitational radiation circularization, and what ‘odd orbits’ imply for GW inference.

c854a159e65d.png.caption: Additional figure from Space.com article on black hole–neutron star mergers with eccentric pre-merger orbits; likely illustrates orbital evolution/eccentricity vs time or formation pathways, useful to compare against GW circularization expectations.

708471f404ab.png.caption: Qodo vs Claude code review benchmark results chart — useful evidence/visual for a post about verification throughput and how 'review' is becoming a measurable bottleneck.

fe77b03fe486.svg.caption: Official SLSA v1.0 provenance model diagram (subject/builder/materials/predicate) — strong primary-source visual for explaining 'agent receipts' as supply-chain provenance and as priors for trust/verification throughput.
